name: Agent-run recovery for senolytics scaffold self-healing repair
summary: Recovers the target self-healing agent-run record from partial status after the senolytics scaffold repair candidate completed review and was accepted, while preserving that the original scaffold candidate itself remains in needs_revision and was not promoted.

scope.question: Recover the self-healing-candidate-revision-senolytics-scaffold-bootstrap-2026-06-21 agent-run state after its repair candidate completed review and promotion handling.

proposed_records.rationale: Tracks this bounded agent-run recovery repair without promoting any candidate.
Aligns the target agent-run status and blockers with the completed repair-candidate review state while preserving remaining scaffold-candidate limitations as separate next-action context.
